title: Micme configuration
description: Machine-level Micme settings. Shell environment variables override saved values.

MICME_STREAM_KEEP_CONTEXT.description: Pass --keep-context to whisper-stream. Defaults to off for append-only dictation.

MICME_STREAM_FINALIZE_WITH_CLIP.description: When enabled, stop-time clip transcription may replace the append-only live stream transcript.

MICME_STREAM_FLUSH_MS.description: Quiet interval in milliseconds before tentative stream words are committed append-only.

MICME_RECORD_COMMAND.description: Advanced shell command hook. Use only trusted commands.

MICME_TRANSCRIBE_COMMAND.description: Advanced shell command hook. Use only trusted commands.

^MICME_.description: Micme runtime setting. Values are read as strings by Micme.
